case_title: ANDREW J CECENA VS. GAVIN THOMPSON

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY CECENA, ANDREW J THOMPSON, GAVIN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 11/27/13. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $475.00 FILED BY CECENA, ANDREW J AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, GAVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-17-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE IN COURT. APPEARANCE IN COURT NOT NECESSARY IF OBLIGATION IS ALREADY SATISFIED. EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED.
